title: agropyron multiflorum
intro: Agropyron multiflorum, also known as hard fescue, is a type of grass native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion, and it is also used to treat respiratory issues. Agropyron multiflorum can be prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, and it is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
